name: Virtus Convertible & Income Fund 5.625% Series A Cumulative Preferred Shares
summary: Virtus Convertible & Income Fund 5.625% Series A Cumulative Preferred Shares is a closed-end management investment company. The fund seeks to provide total return through a combination of current income and capital appreciation by investing in a diversified portfolio of convertible securities and income-producing common stocks. The fund is managed by Virtus Investment Advisers, Inc.
